title: Velvety Spanish Rice Salmorejo
description: A rich and creamy Spanish dish made with seasoned rice vinegar, tomatoes, and smoked paprika, perfect for a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Red wine vinegar
ingredients.notes: Seasoned with pepper and smoked paprika

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the red pepper flakes and cook for 1 minute, until the flakes begin to darken.
Add the crushed tomatoes, seasoned rice vinegar, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the uncooked white rice and stir to combine, ensuring the rice is well coated with the tomato mixture.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the grated Manchego cheese until melted and creamy.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the Salmorejo hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
Let the Salmorejo rest for 5 minutes before serving, as it will thicken and become even creamier.
